content.title: CLI Tool for Developers

userStory.iWant: a CLI tool to manage tasks from my terminal
userStory.soThat: I never have to leave my IDE to update task status

acceptanceCriteria.then: I see my tasks sorted by AI priority with status indicators
the task moves to Done and the board updates in real-time
I see a terminal-based focus timer and my top task

implementationDetails: Commander.js for CLI argument parsing with subcommands
Ink (React for CLI) for the focus timer terminal UI
npm package @taskflow/cli with postinstall setup wizard
content.notes: CLI is a nice-to-have for v1.0 — could be deferred to v1.1 if timeline is tight.
